calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Aug-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Veronica Tunucci (415-259-8944; vtunucci@yahoo.com) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Peter A. Cownan, Esq. (415-554-3863; peter.cownan@sfcityatty.org) Deputy City Attorney for Real Party in Interest City and County of San Francisco.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER VERONICA TUNUCCI'S Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is taken under submission.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

*** Order Denying Second Motion for Writ of Administrative Mandamus signed after hearing ***

Ntc Of Mtn For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Jul-09-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER VERONICA TUNUCCI'S Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is Off calendar. Petitioner may refile this motion when she accompanies it with a memorandum of points and authorities in compliance with California Rules of Court ("CRC") 3.1113(a).

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964. =(302/RBU)
